title: Italy National Visa Application (D)
description: The Ministero degli Affari Esteri e della Cooperazione Internazionale's (MAECI) bilingual Italian/English 'Domanda di visto nazionale (D)' / 'National Visa Application (D)' -- the long-stay (Type D) national visa a non-EU/EEA/Swiss national applies for at an Italian embassy or consulate for a stay exceeding the 90-day Schengen short-stay limit, for purposes including family reunification, religious reasons, sport, mission, diplomatic travel, medical treatment, study, adoption, salaried employment, or self-employment. Opens Italy's Visa vertical (1 of 6). The source is a static, unauthenticated, free-of-charge PDF distributed directly from esteri.it, with no AcroForm layer (confirmed via pdfjs-dist returning zero Widget annotations on pages 1-2 and only unrelated Link annotations on page 3) -- a hand-fill/print specimen, following this registry's coordinate/prose-position extraction convention for static PDFs (e.g. hr/mvep/zahtjev-za-dugotrajnu-vizu, pl/mf/zeznanie-pit-37). A field-by-field reconciliation against the already-modelled EU-harmonized long-stay-visa template lineage (de/auswaertiges-amt/national-visa-application, bg/mvnr/zayavlenie-za-izdavane-na-natsionalna-viza-tip-d, es/maec/solicitud-visado-nacional, hr/mvep/zahtjev-za-dugotrajnu-vizu) confirmed this is NOT a duplicate: this form has no spouse, children, or parents sections at all (unlike Germany's and Bulgaria's forms), no criminal-conviction or notifiable-disease disclosure questions, and no accommodation-type or previous-stays-in-Italy blocks -- while carrying genuinely Italy-specific content none of the siblings carry: a Schengen-first-country-of-entry field (item 22), a numeric maximum-365-day intended-stay cap (item 24), a two-sided EU-Annex-I-style travel-funding block naming both an applicant-covered and a sponsor-covered means-of-subsistence pathway (item 28), a dedicated 'personal data of the family member who is an EU, EEA or CH citizen' block plus its own family-relationship taxonomy (items 29-30, with no counterpart on any sibling long-stay-visa template in this registry), and a closing declaration citing Article 331 of the Italian Code of Criminal Procedure (criminal referral for false statements) and the Garante per la Protezione dei Dati Personali (Italy's data-protection supervisory authority) by name. See VERIFICATION.md for the full item-by-item reconciliation table. This v1.0.0 models: the applicant identity and marital-status block (items 1-9), the minors'-guardian and travel-document block (items 10-16), residence-in-a-third-country and current occupation/employer (items 17-19), the 11-category purpose-of-journey taxonomy (item 20), destination and Schengen-first-entry data (items 21-22), entries/duration/arrival (items 23-25), the family-reunification/employer-in-Italy contact block (item 26), the host company/organization contact block (item 27), the two-sided travel-funding block (item 28), the EU/EEA/CH family-member data and relationship blocks (items 29-30), and the place-and-date of signing (item 31). It deliberately does NOT model the 'Spazio riservato all'Amministrazione' (For Office use only) column running down page 1 (application date, application number, receiving mission/service provider, case handler, documents-received checklist, visa decision, validity dates, number of entries and days granted) -- entirely consular-adjudication-only content, not applicant-facing -- nor the physical signature itself (item 32), per this registry's standing convention. It does not submit the application; the live source is always authoritative. GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Italy or MAECI.

authority.name: Ministero degli Affari Esteri e della Cooperazione Internazionale

source.documentRef: National Visa Application (D) / Domanda di visto nazionale (D)

verification.notes: GOV-3032: GovSchema Standard Research cycle, opening Italy's Visa vertical. Independently re-fetched this cycle directly from esteri.it (HTTP 200, application/pdf, 283,335 bytes, sha256 eba970bc7eebfde7ed96f61a428172017e31b8586e6dd5effafe35ec41aa4dee, matching a prior scouting pass's claimed value exactly) and independently re-extracted with pdfjs-dist (legacy/build/pdf.js): 3 pages, zero Widget annotations on pages 1-2 and only unrelated Link annotations on page 3 (a static hand-fill/print template, not a fillable AcroForm), full printed item text captured via getTextContent(). A field-by-field reconciliation against the already-modelled de/auswaertiges-amt/national-visa-application (81 fields, 16 sections incl. spouse/children/parents/criminal-conviction/notifiable-disease), bg/mvnr/zayavlenie-za-izdavane-na-natsionalna-viza-tip-d (spouse+4-child repeating table+guardian+3-prior-stay blocks), es/maec/solicitud-visado-nacional (12-category purpose taxonomy + sponsor/employer/school blocks), and hr/mvep/zahtjev-za-dugotrajnu-vizu (11-category purpose taxonomy + two-step residence-approval construct) confirmed this is a materially distinct, shorter, differently organized form -- not a duplicate. See VERIFICATION.md for the full reconciliation table and every disclosed judgment call.

fields.name: surname
fields.label: 1. Surname (Family name) / Cognome
fields.description: As specified in the travel document.

fields.name: surnameAtBirth
fields.label: 2. Surname at birth (Former family name/s) / Cognome alla nascita (Cognome/i precedente/i)

fields.name: firstNames
fields.label: 3. First name/s (Given name/s) / Nome/i
fields.description: As specified in the travel document.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: 4. Date of birth (dd/mm/yy) / Data di nascita (gg/mm/aa)

fields.name: placeOfBirth
fields.label: 5. Place of birth / Luogo di nascita

fields.name: countryOfBirth
fields.label: 6. Country of birth / Stato di nascita

fields.name: currentNationality
fields.label: 7. Current nationality / Cittadinanza attuale

fields.name: nationalityAtBirthIfDifferent
fields.label: Nationality at birth, if different / Cittadinanza alla nascita, se diversa

fields.name: sex
fields.label: 8. Gender / Sesso
fields.description: Male / Maschile, Female / Femminile.

fields.name: maritalStatus
fields.label: 9. Marital Status / Stato civile
fields.description: The form's own checkbox list: Single / Non coniugato/a, Married / Coniugato/a, Separated / Separato/a, Divorced / Divorziato/a, Widow(er) / Vedovo/a, Other (pls. specify) / Altro (precisare).

fields.name: otherMaritalStatusDetails
fields.label: 9. Marital Status -- Other (pls. specify) / Altro (precisare)

fields.name: guardianDetails
fields.label: 10. In case of minors: surname, first name, address (if different from applicant's) and nationality of the holder of parental responsibility/legal guardian
fields.description: A single free-text box collecting the legal guardian's details, applicable only when the applicant is a minor. The form does not itself carry a separate 'is the applicant a minor?' checkbox to gate this field on, so it is left ungated rather than fabricating a condition the source does not state.

fields.name: travelDocumentType
fields.label: 11. Type of travel document / Tipo di documento
fields.description: The form's own checkbox list: Ordinary Passport / Passaporto ordinario, Diplomatic Passport / Passaporto diplomatico, Service Passport / Passaporto di servizio, Official Passport / Passaporto ufficiale, Special Passport / Passaporto speciale, Other travel document (pls. specify) / Documento di viaggio di altro tipo (precisare).

fields.name: otherTravelDocumentTypeDetails
fields.label: 11. Other travel document (pls. specify) / Documento di viaggio di altro tipo (precisare)

fields.name: travelDocumentNumber
fields.label: 12. Number of travel document / Numero documento di viaggio

fields.name: travelDocumentDateOfIssue
fields.label: 13. Date of issue / Data di rilascio

fields.name: travelDocumentValidUntil
fields.label: 14. Valid until / Valido fino a

fields.name: travelDocumentIssuedBy
fields.label: 15. Issued by / Rilasciato da

fields.name: applicantAddressAndEmail
fields.label: 16. Applicant's home address and e-mail address / Indirizzo del domicilio e di posta elettronica del richiedente
fields.description: The source presents postal address and e-mail address as a single combined free-text box, not two separate boxes; modelled as one field rather than splitting a structure the source itself does not split.

fields.name: applicantPhoneNumbers
fields.label: Telephone number/s / Numero/i di telefono

fields.name: residesInCountryOtherThanNationality
fields.label: 17. Residence in a country other than the country of current nationality / Residenza in un Paese diverso dal Paese di cittadinanza attuale
fields.description: No / Yes -- Si.

fields.name: residencePermitOrEquivalent
fields.label: 17. Residence permit or equivalent / Titolo di soggiorno o equivalente

fields.name: residencePermitValidUntil
fields.label: 17. Valid until / Valido fino al

fields.name: currentOccupation
fields.label: 18. Current occupation / Occupazione attuale

fields.name: employerOrEducationalInstituteDetails
fields.label: 19. Employer and employer's address and telephone number. For students, name and address of educational institute / Datore di lavoro, indirizzo e telefono. Per gli studenti, nome e indirizzo dell'istituto di insegnamento.
fields.description: The form prints no explicit boolean gate distinguishing employed from unemployed/retired applicants for this item, so it is left unconditionally optional rather than gated on a fabricated field, consistent with this registry's treatment of the equivalent field on hr/mvep/zahtjev-za-dugotrajnu-vizu (currentEmployerOrEducationalEstablishment).

fields.name: purposeOfJourney
fields.label: 20. Main purpose/s of the journey / Scopo/i principale/i del viaggio
fields.description: The form's own 11-option checkbox list: Family reunification/following family member / Ricongiungimento familiare/Familiare al seguito; Religious reasons / Motivi religiosi; Sport / Sport; Mission / Missione; Diplomatic / Diplomatico; Medical reasons / Cure mediche; Study / Studio; Adoption / Adozione; Salaried employment / Lavoro subordinato; Self-employment / Lavoro autonomo; Other (pls. specify) / Di altro tipo (precisare). This taxonomy has no equivalent structure in any sibling long-stay-visa template already modelled in this registry -- de/auswaertiges-amt's own 6-value purpose enum has no Adoption, Mission, Diplomatic, Religious-reasons, or Sport categories; es/maec's 12-value taxonomy and hr/mvep's 11-value taxonomy are both differently organized around residence/work permits rather than this form's mix of consular-service categories. Modelled as one enum from 11 independent checkbox widgets, per this registry's established convention for this widget class (see es/maec/solicitud-visado-nacional's own maritalStatus judgment call).

fields.name: otherPurposeDetails
fields.label: 20. Other (pls. specify) / Di altro tipo (precisare)

fields.name: destinationInItaly
fields.label: 21. Your destination in Italy / Destinazione in Italia

fields.name: schengenStateOfFirstEntry
fields.label: 22. Schengen State of first entry (if applicable) / Eventuale Stato Schengen di primo ingresso
fields.description: Marked '(if applicable)' on the form itself; left optional. Not present on any sibling long-stay-visa template already modelled in this registry.

fields.name: numberOfEntriesRequested
fields.label: 23. Number of entries requested / Numero di ingressi richiesti
fields.description: Three independent checkbox widgets: 1, 2, Multiple entries / Multipli ingressi.

fields.name: numberOfDaysOfIntendedStay
fields.label: 24. Number of days of intended stay (max. 365) / Indicare i giorni di soggiorno previsti (massimo 365)
fields.description: A numeric days-of-stay cap explicit on the form itself, not present in this exact form on any sibling long-stay-visa template already modelled in this registry (siblings instead ask for an intended arrival/duration date range).

fields.name: intendedDateOfArrivalInSchengenArea
fields.label: 25. Intended date of arrival in Schengen area / Data di arrivo prevista nell'area Schengen

fields.name: familyReunificationOrEmployerContactName
fields.label: 26. Surname and name of the person in Italy who applied for Family Reunification, or surname and name of the Employer in Italy

fields.name: addressInItalyForOtherPurposes
fields.label: 26. For Adoption, Religious Reasons, Medical Reasons, Sport, Study, Mission, please specify the address in Italy

fields.name: familyReunificationOrEmployerContactAddressAndEmail
fields.label: 26. Address and e-mail of the person(s) who applied for Family Reunification or the Employer

fields.name: familyReunificationOrEmployerContactPhoneAndFax
fields.label: 26. Telephone and fax number of the person(s) who applied for Family Reunification or the Employer

fields.name: hostCompanyNameAndAddress
fields.label: 27. Name and address of host Company/Organization
fields.description: The form prints no explicit boolean/purpose gate for item 27 distinct from item 26's own conditions, so it is left unconditionally optional rather than fabricating one.

fields.name: hostCompanyPhoneAndFax
fields.label: 27. Telephone and fax number of the Company/Organization

fields.name: hostCompanyContactPersonDetails
fields.label: 27. Surname, first name, address, telephone, fax and email address of contact person in Company/Organization

fields.name: travelCostsCoveredBy
fields.label: 28. Cost of traveling and living during the applicant's stay is covered by / Le spese di viaggio e soggiorno del richiedente sono a carico
fields.description: The form's own text: 'THIS INFORMATION IS NOT NECESSARY FOR THE FOLLOWING TYPES OF VISA: Family Reunification, Following Family Member, Salaried Employment, Self Employment, Mission, Diplomatic, Adoption' -- so this field is gated on the complementary set of purposeOfJourney values (religious reasons, sport, medical reasons, study, other) for which the form's own text implies it is necessary. the applicant / del richiedente; a sponsor (host, company, organization) / del promotore (ospite, impresa, organizzazione); Other / Altro.

fields.name: otherTravelCostsCoveredByDetails
fields.label: 28. Other (pls. specify) / Altro (precisare)

fields.name: sponsorReferenceOrDetails
fields.label: 28. Sponsor (host, company, organization), please specify -- referred to in box n. 26 or 27, or Other (please specify) / del promotore (ospite, impresa, organizzazione, precisare) -- di cui alle caselle 26 o 27
fields.description: The form allows referencing the person/organization already named in item 26 or 27, or naming another sponsor.

fields.name: applicantMeansOfSupport
fields.label: 28. Means of support (applicant) / Mezzi di sussistenza (select all that apply)
fields.description: Modelled as a comma-separated list of: cash, travellers_cheques, credit_cards, prepaid_accommodation, prepaid_transport, other -- multi-select-as-string treatment, following the precedent fr/france-visas/schengen-visa-application already established for this exact EU Annex-I-style funding block (pending GSP-0009).

fields.name: sponsorMeansOfSupport
fields.label: 28. Means of support (sponsor) / Mezzi di sussistenza (select all that apply)
fields.description: Modelled as a comma-separated list of: cash, accommodation_provided, all_expenses_covered, prepaid_transport, other -- the sponsor-side checklist differs from the applicant-side one (no traveller's cheques/credit cards; instead 'all expenses covered during the stay').

fields.name: euEeaChFamilyMemberSurname
fields.label: 29. Personal data of the family member who is an EU, EEA or CH citizen -- Surname / Dati anagrafici del familiare che e cittadino UE, SEE o CH -- Cognome
fields.description: Applicable only to applicants claiming a free-movement family-member relationship to an EU/EEA/Swiss citizen. The form prints no separate 'are you a family member of an EU/EEA/CH citizen?' boolean distinct from filling in items 29-30 themselves, so this block is left ungated rather than fabricating a condition the source does not state. No counterpart on any sibling long-stay-visa template already modelled in this registry.

fields.name: euEeaChFamilyMemberFirstNames
fields.label: 29. First Name/s / Nome/i

fields.name: euEeaChFamilyMemberDateOfBirth
fields.label: 29. Date of birth / Data di nascita

fields.name: euEeaChFamilyMemberNationality
fields.label: 29. Nationality / Cittadinanza

fields.name: euEeaChFamilyMemberTravelDocumentOrIdNumber
fields.label: 29. Number of travel document or ID card / Numero del documento di viaggio o della carta d'identita

fields.name: familyRelationToEuEeaChCitizen
fields.label: 30. Family relation with an EU, EEA or CH citizen / Vincolo familiare con un cittadino UE, SEE o CH
fields.description: Spouse / Coniuge, Son/Daughter / Figlio/a, Other descendant / Altri discendenti diretti, Dependent ascendant / Ascendente a carico, Other (pls. specify) / Altro (precisare). This block (items 29-30 together) has no counterpart on any sibling long-stay-visa template already modelled in this registry.

fields.name: otherFamilyRelationDetails
fields.label: 30. Other (pls. specify) / Altro (precisare)

fields.name: placeAndDateOfSigning
fields.label: 31. Place and date / Luogo e data

documents.label: Photo / Fotografia
documents.sourceRef: National Visa Application (D), p.1, header photo placeholder 'PHOTO / Fotografia'

documents.label: Documento di viaggio / Travel document
documents.sourceRef: National Visa Application (D), p.1, 'Spazio riservato all'Amministrazione' supporting-documents checklist: 'Documento di viaggio'

documents.label: Mezzi di sussistenza / Evidence of means of subsistence
documents.sourceRef: National Visa Application (D), p.1, 'Spazio riservato all'Amministrazione' supporting-documents checklist: 'Mezzi di sussistenza'

documents.label: Invito / Invitation
documents.sourceRef: National Visa Application (D), p.1, 'Spazio riservato all'Amministrazione' supporting-documents checklist: 'Invito'

documents.label: Mezzi di trasporto / Proof of means of transport
documents.sourceRef: National Visa Application (D), p.1, 'Spazio riservato all'Amministrazione' supporting-documents checklist: 'Mezzi di trasporto'

documents.label: Assicurazione sanitaria di viaggio / Travel health insurance
documents.sourceRef: National Visa Application (D), p.1, 'Spazio riservato all'Amministrazione' supporting-documents checklist: 'Assicurazione sanitaria di viaggio'

documents.label: Signed acknowledgement that refusal of a visa does not give rise to reimbursement of fees paid
documents.statement: I am aware of the fact that the refusal of a visa does not give rise to the reimbursement of fees paid / Sono a conoscenza del fatto che il rifiuto del visto non da luogo al rimborso dei diritti pagati per la trattazione della pratica.
documents.sourceRef: National Visa Application (D), p.2, closing acknowledgement above the signature block

documents.label: Signed declaration that the application's particulars are true and complete, acknowledging Article 331 of the Code of Criminal Procedure and the Garante per la Protezione dei Dati Personali data-protection notice
documents.statement: I declare that all information supplied by me are correct and complete. I am aware that false statements will lead to my application being rejected or to the annulment of a visa already granted and will result in the request for the prosecution by the Representation under the law of the State (Article 331 Code of Criminal Procedure). / Dichiaro che tutti i dati da me forniti sono completi ed esatti. Sono consapevole che le dichiarazioni false comporteranno il respingimento della mia domanda o l'annullamento del visto gia concesso e comporteranno la richiesta di avvio di azioni giudiziarie da parte della Rappresentanza ai sensi della legislazione dello Stato (articolo 331 c.p.p.). The Italian national supervisory authority competent for the protection of personal data is the Garante per la Protezione dei Dati Personali (Piazza di Montecitorio 121, 00186 Roma, www.garanteprivacy.it, tel. +3906 696771).
documents.sourceRef: National Visa Application (D), p.3, 'INFORMATION ON THE PROCESSING OF PERSONAL DATA' and closing declaration block

steps.title: Minors and travel document / Minori e documento di viaggio
Contact, residence and occupation / Contatti, residenza e occupazione
Purpose and journey details / Scopo e dettagli del viaggio
Family reunification or employer contact in Italy / Contatto per ricongiungimento familiare o datore di lavoro
Host company or organization / Impresa o organizzazione che invita
Cost of travel and means of support / Spese di viaggio e mezzi di sussistenza
EU, EEA or CH family member / Familiare cittadino UE, SEE o CH
